title: Business Development Manager, VP
description: Ambitious leader who creates strategic alliances with organization leaders to effectively align with and support key business initiatives. Builds and retains high performance teams by hiring, developing and motivating skilled professionals.
experience: Spearheaded sales of the 'managem ytests.com' platform, resulting in a $1.2 million increase in revenue and 60% profit growth in one year as a Business Development Manager, VP. Managed multi-site operations (150 FTE), overseeing customer care, collections, loss mitigation, risk, foreclosure, and underwriting functions. Led a department of 133 FTE as Lending Manager, VP, ensuring compliance, creating specialized teams, and managing vendor relationships. Implemented professional development programs, improving productivity by 12%. Created policies and procedures for external vendors, reducing turn times by 80% and increasing quality by 40%. Supervised customer service and collections call teams, managed HR functions, and played a key role in opening two Call Centers. Analyzed and processed loan applications, ensuring compliance with regulations.
